comment: Validated metrics from Grafana dashboards (mongodb_dashboard.json). Metrics collected from MongoDB exporter and chaos-toolkit instrumentation.

rate(db_mongodb_operation_count_total[1m.description: MongoDB operation execution rate per second (measures database responsiveness and throughput)

rate(db_mongodb_operation_latency_bucket.description: Operation latency histogram (use with histogram_quantile for percentiles)

db_mongodb_connection_pool_active.description: Number of active connections in the MongoDB connection pool

db_mongodb_replication_lag_seconds.description: Replication lag in seconds (should be near zero for healthy replication)

extended_metrics.description: Extended metrics that may be available from MongoDB exporter (optional, for enhanced monitoring)

notes.operation_latency_histogram: The db_mongodb_operation_latency_bucket metric is a histogram. Use histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(db_mongodb_operation_latency_bucket[1m])) to calculate 95th percentile latency.
notes.replication_lag_explanation: Replication lag is measured in seconds. >1 second indicates potential replication issues. >5 seconds indicates serious problems.
notes.connection_pool_note: MongoDB connection pool size varies based on configuration. Monitor active connections trend rather than absolute values.
notes.document_contention: Watch for increased operation latency during chaos tests - this indicates document-level lock contention.
notes.all_metrics_validated: All metrics in this file are validated against mongodb_dashboard.json Grafana dashboard
